description: Represents one directory or logical directory scope context assigned to an operator, including the role assigned for that context.

operator_uid.description: Unique identifier of the operator that owns this directory assignment (e.g., "op_abc123").

directory_uid.description: Unique identifier of the directory context assigned to the operator, or a logical scope value for non-concrete assignments. Supported logical scope values are "all", "duda", and "xperts" (e.g., "dir_abc123", "all", "duda", "xperts").

directory_name.description: Display name of the directory or logical scope context assigned to the operator (e.g., "Example Directory", "All", "Duda", "Xperts").

role.description: Operator role assigned for this directory context (e.g., "admin", "sales").

current.description: Indicates whether this assignment is the operator's current active concrete directory context. Logical scope assignments return false because they are not concrete directory rows (e.g., true).
